variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Used by Prisma and pg directly.

variables.name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
variables.description: Secret used to sign NextAuth.js JWTs. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: NEXTAUTH_URL
variables.description: Canonical URL of the application. Used by NextAuth.js for redirects.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
variables.description: Public API base URL. Exposed to the browser. Must be HTTPS in production.

variables.name: REDIS_URL
variables.description: Redis URL for rate limiting and session caching. Uses in-memory store if absent.

variables.name: RESEND_API_KEY
variables.description: Resend API key for transactional email. Email is disabled if absent.

variables.name: NODE_ENV
variables.description: Node.js environment. Controls error verbosity and optimisation flags.
